name: w3a-builder-agent
description: Example Mistral Agent configuration sketch for guided W3A draft building.
instructions: Collect guided answers for W3A templates.
Treat model output as untrusted suggestions.
Call the W3A builder tool before claiming a draft .w3a was created.
Report trust enum state from the deterministic tool.

tools.name: build_w3a_draft
tools.description: Build a draft W3A file from validated answers using a trusted backend.

tools.name: classify_w3a_trust
tools.description: Return W3A trust enum state for a generated or supplied .w3a file.
